name: io.github.sundeepg98/kite-trading
title: Kite Trading MCP Server
description: Indian stock market trading via Zerodha Kite Connect. 78 tools: order execution, portfolio analytics, options Greeks, paper trading, backtesting, technical indicators, price alerts with Telegram, watchlists, tax harvesting, SEBI compliance. 8 dashboard pages, 7 interactive widgets. Multi-user OAuth.
